Others: New maps, new enemies, new stages, and more

title: Monster Hunter Now
notes:
Thank you for playing Monster Hunter Now.

Key Updates:
・The damage of all of the hunting horn's actions has been increased, and for certain actions, the power to stun has also been increased.
・In the character editor, settings are now saved for each character type.
・When tapping avatars displayed at exploration bases, you can now send/receive friend requests and friend cheers.

title: CarX Street
notes:
- StreetNET Championship event with new quests and exclusive rewards.
- New club added: Emeralds.
- New high-speed highways and interchanges opened.
- Quick emojis chat for in-game communication added.
- Simultaneous gameplay on multiple devices restricted.
- New cars added: BGX, MF1.
- New Special Offers added: Apex Hunter, Turbo Phantom.
- In-game store reworked and improved.

title: Castle Busters
notes: Improvements and bug fixes.

title: Diablo Immortal
notes:
You don’t fight Hell — you command it. Bloodied Jewel unleashes new horrors in Lut Gholein, featuring new story content, 3 Helliquary bosses, and Ancient Legendary gear worth killing for. 

HELL OBEYS ME! Harness forbidden infernal magic as the Warlock, summoning devastating fiends and sacrificing everything for absolute power.

Minor bug fixes and enhancements

title: Pokémon TCG Pocket
notes:
● New Pulsing Aura booster packs are now available.
● Gold frames have been added to flair.
● A Claim All feature has been added for packs.
● Updates to the Obtain Items feature.
● A 2D pattern code feature has been added for friend requests.
● Revisions have been made to some features.

title: Foundation: Galactic Frontier
notes:
Update Highlights:
1. Optimized the duration of the Sacred Tribute Vessel, which is now set to 3 hours.
2. Improved the display of Guild Chest information by removing portrait frames.
3. Other optimizations and bug fixes.
